command: uv run --package weatherflow-core --extra dev python tools/weatherflow_metrics.py --repetitions 3 --output-root /Users/wesz_station/Projects/WeatherFlow/eval/results/weatherflow-v3-production-metrics-v2

cost.minimax_cn_paygo_cny_known_usd_budget_un: explicit mainland PayGo origin; official CNY catalog remains CNY and a USD budget fails closed without FX
cost.minimax_global_paygo_usd_known: explicit global PayGo origin; official USD catalog and deterministic provider-shaped tokens
cost.minimax_token_plan_cost_unknown: explicit Token Plan origin; no PayGo token-price substitution and finite USD budget fails closed
cost.unpriced_openai_cost_unknown: deterministic unpriced token fixture; finite budget must fail closed and cost remains null

isolation.destructive_requires_approval: destructive operation parks in WAITING_APPROVAL before executor invocation
isolation.install_requires_approval: install policy returns APPROVE and MCP installer rejects an empty approved Action
isolation.keychain_access: real Seatbelt denies security list-keychains and exposes no stdout
isolation.loopback_only_network: real Seatbelt LOOPBACK reaches the local server but denies an exact public TCP target reached by the host positive control
isolation.mcp_allowlist_bypass: unexpected MCP tool discovery marks the connection unavailable and exposes no tools
isolation.missing_required_scope: SupervisedPolicy DENY; no executor path is reached
isolation.offline_network: real Seatbelt OFFLINE denies loopback and an exact public TCP target reached by the host positive control
isolation.sandbox_unavailable_fail_closed: missing Seatbelt backend raises SandboxUnavailableError before child creation
isolation.tool_outside_frozen_snapshot: SharedTurnLoop observes a frozen-snapshot miss; surprise executor stays at zero
isolation.unapproved_external_write: external Action parks in WAITING_APPROVAL before executor invocation
isolation.workspace_outside_read: DeveloperExecutor rejects an absolute read outside Workspace action roots
isolation.workspace_outside_write: DeveloperExecutor rejects an outside write and creates no target

corrupt_checkpoint.assertions: rebuild removes the active row, stores hash/reason in quarantine, emits event, and requires review
corrupt_checkpoint.persistence_boundary: RunCheckpoint state contains malformed persisted JSON

encrypted_provider_continuation.assertions: private payload is absent from ordinary checkpoint/tables, restored after rebuild, and deleted at terminal
encrypted_provider_continuation.persistence_boundary: encrypted provider continuation and tool observation are durable before the next model request

external_action_executing_unknown.assertions: rebuild calls no executor and moves both Action and Run to NEEDS_REVIEW
external_action_executing_unknown.persistence_boundary: approved external Action is EXECUTING with unknown result semantics

external_action_succeeded_before_observa.assertions: rebuild recovers the receipt and never repeats the external side effect
external_action_succeeded_before_observa.persistence_boundary: external Action is SUCCEEDED with durable result; observation commit is faulted

model_turn_checkpointed.assertions: rebuild commits the pending final without another model call
model_turn_checkpointed.persistence_boundary: final model turn is the durable pending_turn; terminal Run commit is faulted

read_tool_succeeded_before_observation.assertions: rebuild safely replays the read and completes; one duplicate read call is reported
read_tool_succeeded_before_observation.persistence_boundary: read-only executor returned successfully; observation commit is faulted

run_created_not_started.assertions: rebuilt RuntimeContainer completes the same Run with all frozen identities unchanged
run_created_not_started.persistence_boundary: Run, frozen capability snapshot, model route, and connector route exist; execution has not started

tool_call_persisted_before_observation.assertions: rebuild executes the frozen read tool once, records observation, and completes
tool_call_persisted_before_observation.persistence_boundary: tool call is pending in RunCheckpoint; dispatcher is faulted before execution

waiting_approval.assertions: rebuild returns the same identities, performs no write before decision, then executes once after approval
waiting_approval.persistence_boundary: Run is WAITING_APPROVAL with durable Action and Approval identities

sensitive_data_policy: no credentials, prompts, or provider-private continuation payloads in artifacts
